title: Diagnostics Lookup Response
description: Contract for the read-only diagnostics lookup endpoint (/api/diagnostics). Represents the cached state of the fleet health.

status.description: Overall status of the lookup operation or the underlying diagnostics data.

message.description: Human-readable message, usually populated if status is error or not_found.

schema_version.description: Schema version of the cached diagnostics snapshot.

generated_at.description: Timestamp when the diagnostics snapshot was generated.
